howWeWork.heading: From Idea to Execution, Engineered for Outcomes
howWeWork.intro: Structured phases to design, build, and scale digital systems that perform.
howWeWork.closingP: Each phase moves you toward measurable outcomes, not just a finished site.

phase1.label: Phase 1
phase1.title: Audit & Deconstruction
phase1.description: Technical audit of assets, competitor context, and gap mapping across performance, UX, and conversion goals.

phase2.label: Phase 2
phase2.title: Architecture & Strategy
phase2.description: IA, conversion-first wires, SEO hierarchy, and scalable system decisions. Not page-by-page guesswork.

phase3.label: Phase 3
phase3.title: Design System & UI
phase3.description: High-fidelity UI, a real design system (type, spacing, components), and prototypes when the flow needs them.

phase4.label: Phase 4
phase4.title: Build & Optimization
phase4.description: Modern stack build, Core Web Vitals, CMS and integrations, plus responsive and cross-browser QA.

phase5.label: Phase 5
phase5.title: Launch & Scale
phase5.description: Ship with QA, analytics, CRO, and an iteration roadmap. Launch is the start of improvement.

whyUs.heading: A different kind of agency
whyUs.intro: Most agencies focus on design and delivery. We focus on systems, performance, and outcomes.
whyUs.contextP: Choosing a partner is not about freelancers versus agencies. It is about the level of thinking, execution, and long-term impact you need.
whyUs.tableCaption: Capability comparison: Torpedo Web versus typical freelancers and traditional agencies
whyUs.closingP: We operate as a focused engineering partner: freelancer agility with agency structure and reliability, without the usual trade-offs.
